Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Continued To Jul-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Christopher C. Carin, Esq. for Stacy Jennings, Petitioner;
Stacy Jennings, Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that it had read the papers and invited comments by Mr. Carin. Mr. Carin stated that he had nothing to add. The Court stated that it left this matter on calendar today to see if anyone would appear to object. The Court inquired if anyone was appearing via Zoom, in person, or by CourtCall to object.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated March 31, 1999, is admitted to probate. Stacy Jennings is appointed as the Administrator with will Annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for November 25, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.
